scripts.setup: python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r etl/requirements.txt && cd dashboard && npm install
scripts.setup:win: py -3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r etl/requirements.txt && cd dashboard && npm install
scripts.models: .venv/bin/python etl/points_model.py && .venv/bin/python etl/lineup_solver.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && .venv/bin/python etl/dp_archive_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --since 2019-01-01 && .venv/bin/python etl/outcomes_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --seasons 2019 2025 --seed-fc && .venv/bin/python etl/project_production.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && .venv/bin/python etl/cornering_metrics.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db
scripts.models:win: .venv\Scripts\python etl/points_model.py && .venv\Scripts\python etl/lineup_solver.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && .venv\Scripts\python etl/dp_archive_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --since 2019-01-01 && .venv\Scripts\python etl/outcomes_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --seasons 2019 2025 --seed-fc && .venv\Scripts\python etl/project_production.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && .venv\Scripts\python etl/cornering_metrics.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db
scripts.all: npm run etl && npm run models && npm run dev
scripts.all:win: npm run etl:win && npm run models:win && npm run dev
